items.title: 'A truly historic moment': BBC reports from Hungary as Viktor Orbán concedes election
items.dek: Rajini Vaidyanathan broadcasts from outside Hungary's parliament as crowds hear about the prime minister's concession.
items.body: Rajini Vaidyanathan broadcasts from outside Hungary's parliament as crowds hear about the prime minister's concession.

items.title: What is a naval blockade and how would it work in Strait of Hormuz?
items.dek: Donald Trump says that the US is going to start blockading the Strait of Hormuz. What does this mean in practice?
items.body: Donald Trump says that the US is going to start blockading the Strait of Hormuz. What does this mean in practice?

items.title: Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
items.dek: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.
items.body: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.
